The Proposal: -
A total of 743 Temporary in Amravati Educational Department under the School Education Department.
Reference No. 1 by the decision of the Government hereunder. Extending from 01.09.2025 to 28.02.2026
It had come. Now the Commissioner (Education) Reference No. 3 of Amravati Educational Department.
There are a total of 743 vacancies. In requesting an extension from 01.03.2026 to 31.08.2026
It has come. Reference No. 2 Temporary posts to the Administrative Division as per the Government decision herein.
The powers to extend the period have been granted. Accordingly, these temporary posts have been extended.
The issue of payment was under the consideration of the government.
The Government's Decisions:
A total of 743 Temporary in Amravati Educational Department under the School Education Department.
Give the positions. Government approves extension from 01.03.2026 to 31.08.2026
